data.name: Akayo Therapy
data.detailed_description:
Akayo Therapy: This is a relaxing game in the genre "Clicker" in which you can enjoy nice music and not difficult gameplay, but you have to try hard to open the girls.

What can be found in this game:

Beautiful pictures and animations of the girls.

the Solution Of Logical Problems.

Incredible Sound and Visual Effects.

A Short story With A Denouement At the End.

Your Collection Of Beautiful Girls.

Many achievements and secret achievements.

data.short_description: Akayo Therapy is a game about a therapist who must overcome the shyness of hot girls, while avoiding his own dirty fantasies.
